short: A Python library that makes an LLM return results in a fixed, checked shape using Pydantic templates.
definition: Instructor is a lightweight Python library that wraps LLM API clients to return structured output checked against Pydantic models (templates that describe the exact shape and field types a result must have). It works across providers, automatically retries when a result fails the check, and supports partial extraction and streaming. By turning free-form responses into predictable data objects, it makes language models reliable data extractors without hand-parsing the output.
